name: phdevutils/core
description: Filipino developer utilities — peso (incl. Tagalog number-words), government IDs (TIN/SSS/PhilHealth/Pag-IBIG/PhilSys National ID/UMID/passport/PRC), phone (parse + E.164 normalize), address (regions/provinces/cities/municipalities), and PH holidays (regular + special, with DOLE pay multipliers).
